creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
[DESCRIBE CHANGES]
This version was broken for version 9 and later. I have fixed it up based on a patch of Andriy Gapon which works
in k3b-kde4. This patch is not exactly the same as that; it was modified to suite the dependancy of kde3. While working on the patch 
I have found a line on the patch added like :
+ * Copyright (C) 2011 Andriy Gapon <avg@FreeBSD.org>

So I am not yet sure whether if I am allowed to use that codebase. If not feel free to close the PR. However I have checked the patch 
and it works for me.

Additionally I am adding some reference for the committers :
https://redports.org/~subzero/20120321143232-24110-16691/k3b-1.0.5_15.log
https://redports.org/~subzero/20120321143232-24110-16692/k3b-1.0.5_15.log
https://redports.org/~subzero/20120321143232-24110-16693/k3b-1.0.5_15.log
https://redports.org/~subzero/20120321143232-24110-16696/k3b-1.0.5_15.log
https://redports.org/~subzero/20120321143232-24110-16697/k3b-1.0.5_15.log
https://redports.org/~subzero/20120321143232-24110-16698/k3b-1.0.5_15.log

Sorry to say that it does not build on 7.4 as one of it's dependency kdelibs3 does not build fully on 7.4.

Added file(s):
- files/extra-patch-libk3bdevice-k3bscsicommandbsd.cpp

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_4 (mode: change, diff: ports)
